{{69,5,0},{81,17,9},{89,12,3},{86,9,0},{56,3,0},{63,10,3},{120,8,0},{125,12,0},{119,9,0},{120,10,0},{159,110,24},{217,168,82},{201,166,60},{202,167,61},{173,137,47},{148,112,23},{205,172,66},{207,173,67},{238,171,97},{154,87,13},{120,10,2},{125,15,6},{111,19,8},{110,18,6},{63,8,0},{70,15,6},{105,17,4},{105,17,4},{53,18,12},{38,3,0},{22,9,4},{23,10,5}}

}

for f=1,tf do
    pf[f]={}
    for y=1,32 do
        pf[f][y]={}
    end
end

for f=1,tf do
    for y=1,32 do
        for x=1,32 do
            local p=fr[f][y][x]
            if p then
                local b=Instance.new"Frame"
                b.Size=UDim2.new(0,4,0,4)
                b.Position=UDim2.new(0,(x-1)*4,0,(y-1)*4)
                b.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(p[1],p[2],p[3])
                b.BorderSizePixel=0
                b.Parent=fh
                b.Visible=(f==1)
                pf[f][y][x]=b
            end
        end
    end
end

local lt=tick()
R.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    local nt=tick()
    if nt-lt>=d/1000 then
        lt=nt
        for f=1,tf do
            for y=1,32 do
                for x=1,32 do
                    local b=pf[f] and pf[f][y] and pf[f][y][x]
                    if b then
                        b.Visible=(f==cf)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        cf=cf+1
        if cf>tf then cf=1 end
    end
end)

local audioData = ""
local audioFile = "temp_audio_d7OS_xwQivA.mp3"

writefile(audioFile, game:HttpGet("data:application/octet-stream;base64," .. audioData))

local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
sound.SoundId = getcustomasset(audioFile)
sound.Volume = 0
sound.Looped = true
sound.Parent = pl.Character and pl.Character:FindFirstChild("Head") or pl.CharacterAdded:Wait()

sound:Play()

local targetVolume = 0.5
local fadeInTime = 2

task.spawn(function()
    local steps = 20
    local stepTime = fadeInTime / steps
    for i = 1, steps do
        if sound then
            sound.Volume = targetVolume * (i / steps)
            task.wait(stepTime)
        end
    end
end)
